overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, futuristic vehicles, and reflective wet streets. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases dense urban architecture with holographic advertisements and a bustling dystopian atmosphere.

slight turn to approach the intersection crosswalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath towering cyberpunk architecture, passing a glowing arcade machine and approaching a busy intersection. The wet pavement reflects vibrant red neon lights from the building facades while futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk into open intersection
waiting at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by
beginning to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella crossing the street

sleek black car with glowing accent lights
skyscraper covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open intersection, waiting for traffic before crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. Futuristic vehicles drive past while pedestrians with glowing accessories cross together, and towering neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline ahead.

passing pedestrians seated on concrete benches along the building wall

large floating advertisement with blue text and graphics

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the opposite sidewalk beneath a protective building overhang, passing pedestrians resting on concrete benches. The walkway features purple neon storefronts and holographic billboards while sheltered from the rain, with the street and traffic now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered walkway across a bustling intersection and back under a protective overhang. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath towering architecture, passing a glowing arcade machine as the wet pavement reflects vibrant red neon lights from the surrounding facades. As the camera emerges from the shelter into an open intersection, it pauses before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a stream of futuristic vehicles and pedestrians with glowing accessories. The scene then shifts back beneath a building overhang on the opposite side of the street, passing pedestrians on concrete benches. Finally, the perspective glides past purple neon storefronts and holographic billboards while the traffic and rain-slicked road remain visible to the left.
